ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the recipe */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine of the recipe */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recipe */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the recipe */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe makes */,
  "prep_time" TEXT /* Preparation time for the recipe */,
  "cook_time" TEXT /* Cooking time for the recipe */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time required to prepare and cook the recipe */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Flag if the recipe is vegetarian */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Flag if the recipe is vegan */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Flag if the recipe is gluten-free */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the ingredient */,
  "shelf_life" TEXT /* Shelf life of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the ingredient */,
  "is_allergen" INTEGER /* Flag if the ingredient is a common allergen */,
  "ingredient_type" TEXT /* Type of ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert to a base unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-ingredient relationship */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the ingredient required */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "display_order" INTEGER /* Display order of the ingredient in the recipe */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the ingredient usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preparation_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preparation step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the preparation process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image illustrating the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preparation_steps_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_information" (
  "nutritional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional information entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat per serving (in grams) */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving (in grams) */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving (in grams) */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar per serving (in grams) */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber per serving (in grams) */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium per serving (in milligrams) */,
  "vitamins" TEXT /* List of vitamins present in the recipe */,
  "minerals" TEXT /* List of minerals present in the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_information_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., chef, nutritionist, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recipe */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recipe was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "current_stock" REAL /* Current stock level of the ingredient */,
  "reorder_point" REAL /* Reorder point for the ingredient */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the ingredient is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
